requirement: observed capability beyond grant triggers audit and block/degrade/manual intervention
unverifiable profile cannot enter new high-risk write path
reopened/revoked upstream propagates to affected consumers
revoked_upstream cannot be waived into high-risk primary write

out-of-scope memory artifacts are not injected

release blocker scenarios must pass before release candidate
manifest paths and hashes match actual bundle files
